case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER VS. GISSELLE R ORTIZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORTIZ, GISSELLE R $2,029.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.06 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,075.06, DEFENDANT TESTIFIED SHE HAS NO FUNDS. ONLY SOURCE OF INCOME IS SOCIAL SECURITY. THIS IS NOT A DEFENSE TO THE CITY OBTAINING A JUDGMENT. IT MAY WELL BE A DEFENSE TO THE CITY ATTEMPTING TO COLLECT THE JUDGMENT BECAUSE DEFENDANT HAS NO FUNDS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2020 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CCSF TAX COLLECTORS OFFICE, REPRESETEND BY WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GISSELLE R. ORTIZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
